tiles.title: Nodes
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "k8s.node.name") AS nodes FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE "k8s.node.name" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Namespaces
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace)) AS namespaces FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace) IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Pods Seen
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "k8s.pod.name") AS pods FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE "k8s.pod.name" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Containers Seen
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "k8s.container.name") AS containers FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE "k8s.container.name" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Pod Log Events
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $pod_logs_dataset
WHERE ('$namespace' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, '') = '$namespace') AND ('$pod' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.pod.name", body_name, '') = '$pod') AND ('$container' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.container.name", '') = '$container')

tiles.title: Pod Logs Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $pod_logs_dataset
WHERE ('$namespace' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, '') = '$namespace') AND ('$pod' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.pod.name", body_name, '') = '$pod') AND ('$container' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.container.name", '') = '$container') GROUP BY time_bin ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Top Log Namespaces
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, 'unknown') AS namespace, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $pod_logs_dataset GROUP BY COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, 'unknown') ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Top Log Pods
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("k8s.pod.name", body_name, 'unknown') AS pod, COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, 'unknown') AS namespace, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $pod_logs_dataset GROUP BY COALESCE("k8s.pod.name", body_name, 'unknown'), COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, 'unknown') ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Container Restarts
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace, "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, "k8s.container.name" AS container, MAX(data_point_value) AS restarts FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'k8s.container.restarts' GROUP BY "k8s.namespace.name", "k8s.pod.name", "k8s.container.name" HAVING MAX(data_point_value) > 0 ORDER BY restarts DESC LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Top Pod CPU
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace, "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, ROUND(AVG(data_point_value), 6) AS avg_cpu FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'k8s.pod.cpu.usage' GROUP BY "k8s.namespace.name", "k8s.pod.name" ORDER BY avg_cpu DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Top Pod Memory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace, "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, ROUND(AVG(data_point_value), 0) AS avg_memory_bytes FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'k8s.pod.memory.working_set' GROUP BY "k8s.namespace.name", "k8s.pod.name" ORDER BY avg_memory_bytes DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: K8s Event Records
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS events FROM $events_dataset

tiles.title: Warning Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS warnings FROM $events_dataset WHERE type = 'Warning' OR p_log_category = 'WARN'

tiles.title: Event Occurrences
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(count AS DOUBLE)), COUNT(*)) AS occurrences FROM $events_dataset

tiles.title: Warning Occurrences
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(count AS DOUBLE)), COUNT(*)) AS warning_occurrences FROM $events_dataset WHERE type = 'Warning' OR p_log_category = 'WARN'

tiles.title: Events Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COUNT(*) AS events FROM $events_dataset WHERE ('$namespace' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, '') = '$namespace') AND ('$node' = '.*' OR COALESCE(host, "reportingInstance", '') = '$node') GROUP BY time_bin ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Warnings Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COUNT(*) AS warnings FROM $events_dataset WHERE (type = 'Warning' OR p_log_category = 'WARN') AND ('$namespace' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, '') = '$namespace') AND ('$node' = '.*' OR COALESCE(host, "reportingInstance", '') = '$node') GROUP BY time_bin ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Events by Type
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(type, p_log_category, 'unknown') AS event_type, COUNT(*) AS events FROM $events_dataset GROUP BY COALESCE(type, p_log_category, 'unknown') ORDER BY events DESC

tiles.title: Top Event Reasons
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(reason, 'unknown') AS reason, COUNT(*) AS events, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(count AS DOUBLE)), COUNT(*)) AS occurrences FROM $events_dataset GROUP BY COALESCE(reason, 'unknown') ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Top Event Namespaces
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, 'unknown') AS namespace_name, COUNT(*) AS events, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(count AS DOUBLE)), COUNT(*)) AS occurrences FROM $events_dataset GROUP BY COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, 'unknown') ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: Events by Component
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(component, "reportingComponent", 'unknown') AS component_name, COUNT(*) AS events, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(count AS DOUBLE)), COUNT(*)) AS occurrences FROM $events_dataset GROUP BY COALESCE(component, "reportingComponent", 'unknown') ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 15

tiles.title: High Occurrence Warnings
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, 'unknown') AS namespace_name, name, kind, reason, message, MAX(CAST(count AS DOUBLE)) AS occurrences, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $events_dataset WHERE type = 'Warning' OR p_log_category = 'WARN' GROUP BY COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, 'unknown'), name, kind, reason, message ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Recent Warning Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, 'unknown') AS namespace_name, COALESCE(host, "reportingInstance", '') AS node, name, kind, reason, message, CAST(count AS DOUBLE) AS occurrences FROM $events_dataset WHERE (type = 'Warning' OR p_log_category = 'WARN') AND ('$namespace' = '.*' OR COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", namespace, '') = '$namespace') AND ('$node' = '.*' OR COALESCE(host, "reportingInstance", '') = '$node') ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Top Pod Errors
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT coalesce(body_error,body_err,body_msg,body_message,body,'unknown') e,count(*) n FROM $pod_logs_dataset WHERE (severity_text IN ('ERROR','FATAL') OR lower(coalesce(body_level,body_msg,body_message,body_error,body_err,body,'')) LIKE '%error%') AND ('$namespace'='.*' OR coalesce("k8s.namespace.name",body_namespace,'')='$namespace') AND ('$pod'='.*' OR coalesce("k8s.pod.name",body_name,'')='$pod') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Pod Errors Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin('1 minute',p_timestamp,'1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') time_bin,count(*) errors FROM $pod_logs_dataset WHERE (severity_text IN ('ERROR','FATAL') OR lower(coalesce(body_level,body_msg,body_error,body_err,body,'')) LIKE '%error%') AND ('$namespace'='.*' OR coalesce("k8s.namespace.name",body_namespace,'')='$namespace') AND ('$pod'='.*' OR coalesce("k8s.pod.name",body_name,'')='$pod') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

tiles.title: Pod Log Errors by Pod
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("k8s.pod.name", body_name, 'unknown') AS pod, COUNT(*) AS errors FROM $pod_logs_dataset WHERE (severity_text IN ('ERROR','FATAL') OR lower(COALESCE(body_level, body_msg, body_message, body_error, body_err, body, '')) LIKE '%error%') GROUP BY COALESCE("k8s.pod.name", body_name, 'unknown') ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 25

tiles.title: Pod Log Errors by Namespace
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, 'unknown') AS namespace_name, COUNT(*) AS errors FROM $pod_logs_dataset WHERE (severity_text IN ('ERROR','FATAL') OR lower(COALESCE(body_level, body_msg, body_message, body_error, body_err, body, '')) LIKE '%error%') GROUP BY COALESCE("k8s.namespace.name", body_namespace, 'unknown') ORDER BY errors DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Node Ready %
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT 100 * SUM(data_point_value) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'k8s.node.condition_ready' AND "k8s.node.name" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Cluster CPU Usage %
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT 100 * SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.cpu.usage' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.allocatable_cpu' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END),0) AS value FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.node.cpu.usage','k8s.node.allocatable_cpu')

tiles.title: Cluster Memory Usage %
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT 100 * SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.memory.working_set' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.allocatable_memory' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END),0) AS value FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.node.memory.working_set','k8s.node.allocatable_memory')

tiles.title: Cluster Filesystem Usage %
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT 100 * SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.filesystem.usage' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.filesystem.capacity' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END),0) AS value FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.node.filesystem.usage','k8s.node.filesystem.capacity')

tiles.title: Pods by Phase
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT CASE CAST(data_point_value AS INT) WHEN 1 THEN 'Pending' WHEN 2 THEN 'Running' WHEN 3 THEN 'Succeeded' WHEN 4 THEN 'Failed' WHEN 5 THEN 'Unknown' ELSE CAST(data_point_value AS VARCHAR) END AS pod_phase, COUNT(DISTINCT "k8s.pod.name") AS pods FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.phase' GROUP BY pod_phase ORDER BY pods DESC

tiles.title: Namespaces by Phase
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT CASE CAST(data_point_value AS INT) WHEN 1 THEN 'Active' WHEN 2 THEN 'Terminating' ELSE CAST(data_point_value AS VARCHAR) END AS namespace_phase, COUNT(DISTINCT "k8s.namespace.name") AS namespaces FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='k8s.namespace.phase' GROUP BY namespace_phase ORDER BY namespaces DESC

tiles.title: Node Filesystem Usage %
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.node.name" AS node, 100 * SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.filesystem.usage' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.node.filesystem.capacity' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END),0) AS usage_percent FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.node.filesystem.usage','k8s.node.filesystem.capacity') GROUP BY "k8s.node.name" ORDER BY usage_percent DESC

tiles.title: Node Network Errors
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, "k8s.node.name" AS node, SUM(data_point_value) AS errors FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='k8s.node.network.errors' GROUP BY time_bucket, "k8s.node.name" ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Pod Restarts Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, SUM(data_point_value) AS restarts FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='k8s.container.restarts' AND "k8s.namespace.name" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bucket, namespace_name ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Top Restarting Containers
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, "k8s.container.name" AS container, MAX(data_point_value) AS restarts FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='k8s.container.restarts' GROUP BY "k8s.namespace.name", "k8s.pod.name", "k8s.container.name" HAVING MAX(data_point_value) > 0 ORDER BY restarts DESC LIMIT 25

tiles.title: Pod Network Errors by Namespace
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, SUM(data_point_value) AS errors FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='k8s.pod.network.errors' GROUP BY time_bucket, namespace_name ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Unavailable Deployments
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, "k8s.deployment.name" AS deployment, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.deployment.desired' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS desired, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.deployment.available' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS available, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.deployment.desired' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.deployment.available' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS unavailable FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.deployment.desired','k8s.deployment.available') GROUP BY namespace_name, deployment HAVING unavailable > 0 ORDER BY unavailable DESC LIMIT 30

tiles.title: DaemonSets Misscheduled
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, "k8s.daemonset.name" AS daemonset, MAX(data_point_value) AS misscheduled_nodes FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name='k8s.daemonset.misscheduled_nodes' GROUP BY namespace_name, daemonset HAVING MAX(data_point_value) > 0 ORDER BY misscheduled_nodes DESC LIMIT 30

tiles.title: StatefulSets Not Ready
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, "k8s.statefulset.name" AS statefulset, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.statefulset.desired_pods' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS desired, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.statefulset.ready_pods' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS ready, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.statefulset.desired_pods' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.statefulset.ready_pods' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS not_ready FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.statefulset.desired_pods','k8s.statefulset.ready_pods') GROUP BY namespace_name, statefulset HAVING not_ready > 0 ORDER BY not_ready DESC LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Namespace CPU Request vs Usage
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.container.cpu_request' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS requested_cpu, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.pod.cpu.usage' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS used_cpu FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.container.cpu_request','k8s.pod.cpu.usage') GROUP BY namespace_name ORDER BY requested_cpu DESC LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Namespace Memory Request vs Usage
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "k8s.namespace.name" AS namespace_name, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.container.memory_request' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS requested_memory, SUM(CASE WHEN metric_name='k8s.pod.memory.working_set' THEN data_point_value ELSE 0 END) AS used_memory FROM $cluster_metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name IN ('k8s.container.memory_request','k8s.pod.memory.working_set') GROUP BY namespace_name ORDER BY requested_memory DESC LIMIT 30
